skill.name: theme-factory
skill.description: Theme Factory helps apply consistent color palettes and font pairings to slides, documents, reports, and HTML artifacts.
skill.summary: Apply curated visual themes to presentations and other artifacts.
skill.author: 7Spade

security_audit.summary: Static analysis reported many high-risk patterns, but review found they are false positives from Apache License prose, Markdown inline code, and hex color values. No executable scripts, command execution logic, credential access, data exfiltration, or prompt injection text was found in the reviewed skill files.

low_findings.title: License URLs Flagged as Network Activity
low_findings.description: The hardcoded URL findings are Apache License reference links. They are documentation text and do not perform network requests or configure outbound communication.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Both locations are standard Apache License text. There is no code path or instruction that requests these URLs.

low_findings.title: Markdown Backticks Flagged as Command Execution
low_findings.description: The Ruby or shell backtick findings are Markdown inline-code formatting around filenames, directories, and hex colors. They do not execute commands and are not embedded in a script language.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The reviewed files are Markdown content. The flagged backticks wrap display text such as theme-showcase.pdf, themes/, and color hex codes.

low_findings.title: Weak Crypto Keywords Flagged in Non-Code Text
low_findings.description: The weak cryptographic algorithm findings appear in license text, theme descriptions, filenames, headings, and color names. No cryptographic function, hashing routine, or security-sensitive algorithm use was found.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The locations contain prose or theme metadata, not executable code. There is no evidence of MD5, SHA-1, DES, RC4, or similar weak crypto implementation.

low_findings.title: C2 Keyword Flagged in Theme Color Name
low_findings.description: The C2 keyword finding is the word Lavender in a color palette. It is a normal design term and does not indicate command-and-control behavior.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The flagged text is one color entry inside a Markdown theme palette. No network endpoint, beaconing logic, or remote-control instruction is present.

content.value_statement: Inconsistent visual styling makes decks and documents harder to trust. Theme Factory provides curated palettes and font pairings that can be applied consistently across artifacts.
actual_capabilities: Lists ten preset themes with named palettes, hex colors, and font pairings.
Guides theme selection by showing the included theme showcase PDF.
Applies selected colors and fonts to slides, documents, reports, or HTML artifacts.
Provides theme-specific usage guidance for different presentation contexts.
Supports creation of a custom theme when no preset matches the artifact.
limitations: It provides theme specifications, not a rendering engine or design application.
Font availability depends on the user environment and target artifact format.
The skill does not validate accessibility beyond instructing contrast and readability checks.
The included themes are general-purpose and may need brand-specific adjustment.

use_cases.title: Standardize Client Decks
use_cases.description: Apply a consistent visual identity to consulting or sales presentations before review.

use_cases.title: Refresh Internal Reports
use_cases.description: Use a preset palette and typography system to make recurring reports easier to scan.

use_cases.title: Prototype Branded Pages
use_cases.description: Create a coherent color and font direction for HTML landing pages or campaign drafts.

prompt_templates.title: Choose a Theme
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me the available Theme Factory themes and help me choose one for a quarterly business review deck.

prompt_templates.title: Apply a Preset Theme
prompt_templates.prompt: Apply the Ocean Depths theme to this presentation. Keep the content unchanged and improve visual consistency.

prompt_templates.title: Match Theme to Audience
prompt_templates.prompt: Recommend the best Theme Factory preset for an investor update about a software product, then apply it to the artifact.

prompt_templates.title: Create a Custom Theme
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a custom theme for a healthcare analytics report. Include palette, typography, use guidance, and apply it after my approval.

output_examples.input: Apply a professional theme to a financial reporting deck.
output_examples.output: The deck uses the Ocean Depths palette with deep navy backgrounds, teal accents, seafoam highlights, and clean sans-serif typography.

output_examples.input: Create a warm theme for a restaurant concept presentation.
output_examples.output: The presentation uses a Golden Hour direction with warm accent colors, soft neutral backgrounds, and clear text hierarchy.

output_examples.input: Style an innovation landing page draft.
output: Selected Tech Innovation for a high-contrast visual system.
Applied electric blue accents, dark sections, and bold sans-serif headings.
Kept body text readable against all backgrounds.

best_practices: Confirm the chosen theme before applying it to the full artifact.
Check contrast and readability after changing colors or backgrounds.
Keep content structure unchanged unless the user requests layout changes.
anti_patterns: Mixing multiple preset themes in one artifact without a clear section purpose.
Applying accent colors to large text blocks that need high readability.
Creating a custom theme without asking the user to approve the direction.

faq.question: What does Theme Factory do?
faq.answer: It provides curated color palettes and font pairings for styling decks, documents, reports, and HTML artifacts.

faq.question: How many preset themes are included?
faq.answer: The skill includes ten preset themes, each with colors, typography, and suggested use cases.

faq.question: Can it create a new theme?
faq.answer: Yes. It can generate a custom theme from user requirements and ask for review before applying it.

faq.question: Does it edit slides directly?
faq.answer: It gives instructions for applying themes. Actual editing depends on the host tool and artifact format.

faq.question: Does it include brand guidelines?
faq.answer: No. It offers general visual themes that can be adapted to brand requirements.

faq.question: Is it safe to use?
faq.answer: The reviewed files contain Markdown theme guidance and license text. No executable code or network behavior was found.
